description: Provides access to Thunderbird's internal calendar manager for CalDAV auto-wake.

functions.name: syncAndEnableCalDAVCalendars
functions.description: Finds all disabled CalDAV calendars with a remote URL, refreshes them, and enables them after successful sync.

parameters.name: excludePatterns
parameters.description: Calendar name patterns to exclude. Case-insensitive prefix match, optional trailing wildcard (e.g. 'Nextcloud*').

events.name: onOnlineStateRestored
events.description: Fired when Thunderbird transitions from offline to online.
